name: ExtensionCompartmentDefinition_Resource_StartParam
title: R5: Search Param for interpreting $everything.start (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `CompartmentDefinition.resource.startParam` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`CompartmentDefinition.resource.startParam` 0..1 `uri`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `CompartmentDefinition.resource.startParam` 0..1 `uri`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `CompartmentDefinition.resource.startParam` has a context of CompartmentDefinition.resource based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `CompartmentDefinition`.
Element `CompartmentDefinition.resource.startParam` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.comment:
Element `CompartmentDefinition.resource.startParam` has a context of CompartmentDefinition.resource based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `CompartmentDefinition`.
Element `CompartmentDefinition.resource.startParam` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.definition: Search Parameter for mapping requests made with $everything.start (e.g. on [Patient.$everything](https://hl7.org/fhir/patient-operation-everything.html)).
